library(readxl)
library(dplyr)

# Carga los datos
data <- read_excel("C:/Users/laiaz/Downloads/aat3188_table_s1.xlsx", skip = 1)

# Verificar los nombres de columna
colnames(data)

# Seleccionar solo las columnas que nos interesan

data_subset <- data %>%
  select(
    Culture,
    Location,
    `mtDNA haplogroup`,
    `Equivalent mg bone powder used for library preparation`,
    `Shotgun raw sequences`,
    `mtDNA coverage`,
    `mtDNA fraction damaged in last base`
  )

head(data_subset)
